title: Fixing the Chase Travel UI in Two Weeks with Cursor and Claude Code
text:
Looks like you're using an older browser or you've disabled Javascript. So much for all the flashy stuff I was going to show you.
Anyways, I'm Ramzi. I'm a web designer and developer, photographer, videographer, and more.
Reach out to me at ramzidreessen@gmail.com if you'd like to connect.
